title: Atlas Arm v2 Validation Gate
description: Overall validation gate for Atlas Arm v2. All subsystems must pass DVT checklist before this ticket can be closed.

title: Rev B PCB Prototype Bringup
description: Complete initial bringup of Rev B PCB prototype. Verify power rails and basic functionality before moving to validation phase.

title: Grip Module Prototype Assembly
description: Complete first prototype assembly of grip module. Identify any fit and interference issues before design freeze.

title: Prototype BOM Cost Review
description: Review prototype BOM against cost targets. Flag any components exceeding budget before design freeze.

title: Prototype Build Schedule
description: Track prototype build schedule across all subsystems. Identify blockers and ensure build completes on time.

title: Customer Prototype Preview
description: Prepare prototype demo for Acme Robotics preview. Confirm which features will be demonstrated and set expectations.

title: Firmware Bringup on Prototype
description: Load and verify firmware on prototype hardware. Identify any hardware-software integration issues early.

title: Prototype Weight Measurement
description: Measure actual prototype weight against design targets. Flag any overweight subsystems for design review.

title: Prototype Component Sourcing
description: Confirm all prototype components are ordered and delivery dates secured. Flag any long lead time items immediately.

title: Arm Linkage Tolerance Sign-off
description: Sign-off required on updated arm linkage tolerance of +/-0.05mm before tooling order is placed.

title: Grip Module Weight Reduction
description: Grip module currently at 285g vs 250g target. Need to identify and implement lightweighting solution.

title: Hirose Connector Alternate Sourcing
description: Hirose connector lead time extended to 18 weeks. Must identify and qualify alternate supplier by EOD tomorrow to avoid schedule impact.

title: STM32 MCU Production Inventory Check
description: Verify current STM32 MCU inventory of 200 units is sufficient for planned production volume. Flag if additional orders needed.

title: Rev C PCB Bringup
description: Complete full power-cycle validation and functional bringup of Rev C PCB. Currently blocked by pin error found on arrival.

title: EMC Radiated Emissions Fix
description: Radiated emissions slightly exceed FCC limit. Need to design and validate shielding solution before DVT gate.

title: DVT Checklist Completion
description: Collect and verify DVT checklist status from all subsystem owners. Required before validation gate on May 20.

title: Customer Delivery Schedule Review
description: Acme Robotics requesting 2-week delivery acceleration. Assess feasibility based on connector issue resolution and current validation status.

title: Nova Base Platform Dependency Assessment
description: Document downstream impact on Nova Base Platform Q3 timeline if Atlas Arm v2 validation is delayed.

title: Tooling Order for Arm Linkage
description: Place tooling order for arm linkage once tolerance sign-off is complete. Order must go out this week to meet production schedule.

title: Power Budget Final Review
description: Complete final power budget review across all subsystems before DVT gate. Ensure all components within spec.

title: BOM Cost Target Review
description: Review BOM against cost targets with alternate connector pricing factored in. Flag any items exceeding budget.
